# Curator Receipt

## Decision

Kept: the source qualifies as an institute-worthy empirical research artifact.

## Why

It is a serious research manuscript with explicit dataset-based analysis over 24,014 merged agentic PRs and 5,081 merged human PRs, reports concrete measured differences in commits, files touched, deletions, and description-to-diff similarity, and includes methods, validity threats, and reproducibility claims. That is real experimental/evaluative substance, not commentary or promotion.

## Limits

# Curator Receipt

## Decision

Kept: the source qualifies as an institute-worthy empirical research artifact.

## Why

It is a serious research manuscript with explicit dataset-based analysis over 24,014 merged agentic PRs and 5,081 merged human PRs, reports concrete measured differences in commits, files touched, deletions, and description-to-diff similarity, and includes methods, validity threats, and reproducibility claims. That is real experimental/evaluative substance, not commentary or promotion.

## Limits

ArXiv-hosted manuscript with signs of prepublication status, and its findings are bounded to the AIDev dataset and open-source GitHub PRs rather than general software engineering performance or private production settings.
